ham.subject: Password Expiration Reminder – Action Required by 2026-03-10
ham.body:
Dear Colleagues,

This is a reminder that your corporate password will expire in 5 days. Please log in to the employee portal and follow the steps to change your password before the deadline. Failure to update may result in a temporary account lockout.

If you need assistance, contact IT Helpdesk at it-support@company.com.

Thank you,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: Urgent Action Needed: Your Account Has Been Compromised
spam.body:
Hello,

Security analysis shows suspicious activity on your account. To protect your data, we have temporarily suspended your access. Verify your identity now by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, we will permanently delete your profile.

Regards,
Customer Security Team
